title: Validate CI workflow structure and release assumptions
description: Validate the completed workflow configuration after both implementation beads land. Review the YAML structure, job dependency chain, command correctness against the repository, and version/release assumptions so the first push-to-main run is the only remaining live validation step.
acceptance_criteria: Validation confirms the workflow runs `test -> build -> publish` in the intended order using `needs:`.
Validation confirms the pytest command, `uv build`, and version bump commands match the repository's current Python package configuration.
Validation confirms the release flow uses the built artifact handoff rather than rebuilding in `publish`.
Any residual runtime-only risks for the first real GitHub Actions execution are explicitly called out.
conflict_risks: None. `.github/workflows/ci.yml` was the only file in scope and no sibling beads claim it.
